prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Improve task completion by ensuring all parts of the task are addressed, verify the sequence of operations, and enhance result verification."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve task completion by ensuring all parts of the task are addressed, verify the sequence of operations, and enhance result verification.
